## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] New conversion
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing

- [ ] I ran the relevant checks locally.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I updated documentation or conversion explanations where needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR is focused on one change.
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits where practical.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or screen recordings.
- [ ] Related issues are linked.
